name: Grand Actress Auction
description:
Welcome to actress auction

You are rich businessman who participated in this auction along with few rich mens.

There are many famous actress mix of Bollywood and Tollywood they auction themselves off for few months to earn a lot of money. Each would spent 6 months with you if you win particular bids.

Rules :

  1. Each of men can spent max total of $200 millions in entier auction.

  2. Minimum bid is $1 million

  3. You can skip the bid if you don't like the actress

  4. Actress will be at your mercy for 6 months.

(Note : its experimental bot under development, provide feedback in comments to improve)Keywords - India,Indian,desi
creator: Rahul92829
